meta.stack: NestJS, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Redis, Docker, Quran Foundation Content API v4, Gemini
meta.notes: Statuses: completed | in_progress | pending | blocked. Priority: P0 (blocker) .. P3. mvp=true aligns with PRD §14 must-build.

tasks.title: Core platform & DevOps baseline
tasks.description: Repository scaffold, containers, DB schema shell, health checks.

subtasks.title: NestJS app + Prisma + Redis wiring
Dockerfile + docker-compose (api, postgres, redis)
Prisma schema + initial migration (users, reflections, collections, feed_history, streaks)
GET /health (database + Redis checks)
CI: lint, test, build Docker image (optional for MVP)

tasks.title: Authentication — Quran.Foundation OAuth + Ava Quran JWT
tasks.description: End-user login via Quran.Foundation; backend issues JWTs for API access per PRD §6.1 and API_endpoints §2.

subtasks.title: Register OAuth app + configure redirect URIs and env (QURAN_CLIENT_ID/SECRET)
Implement POST /auth/login (return authorization URL or start flow)
Implement GET /auth/callback (exchange code, upsert User, issue tokens)
Implement POST /auth/refresh (rotation policy for refresh token)
Implement POST /auth/logout (revoke refresh / session server-side)
JwtAuthGuard + @CurrentUser() decorator; protect all non-public routes
Rate limiting on auth endpoints (PRD §7)

tasks.title: Quran Foundation Content API v4 — server-side client
tasks.description: OAuth2 client credentials, token cache, typed HTTP client for verses/chapters/search/audio per docs/API_endpoints.md §5.1.

subtasks.title: Env: QF client id/secret, base URL (prelive vs production), scope=content
Token service: fetch + in-memory/Redis cache + retry on 401
HTTP wrapper: x-auth-token + x-client-id on all requests
Map ayah_key (e.g. 2:255) to upstream verse/chapter IDs used by Content API
Retries with backoff for upstream failures (PRD §7 reliability)

tasks.title: Qur’an REST module (/quran/*)
tasks.description: Proxy/aggregate Content API with Redis caching per PRD §6.4 and API_endpoints §5.3.

subtasks.title: GET /quran/ayah/:id — Arabic + translation + audio refs + optional tafsir flags
GET /quran/surah/:id — chapter payload + verse list or pagination
GET /quran/search — forward/query-map to upstream search
GET /quran/related — related ayahs (search-based or dedicated upstream if available)
Redis: ayah:{ayahKey} bundle cache + TTL/invalidation policy
GET /users/me — return Prisma User + prefs aligned with schema
PATCH /users/preferences — DTO validation (language, reciter, moodPreference)
PATCH /users/onboarding — onboardingComplete and step flags if needed

tasks.title: Personalized feed (/feed/*)
tasks.description: Mood-aware feed, interactions, ranking, Redis feed cache per PRD §6.3, §8, §10.

subtasks.title: Define feed card DTO (ayahKey, text refs, translation, audio URL, aiInsight?, tags)
GET /feed — pagination (page/limit or cursor); read mood + user context
Ranking v1: mood match + history + streak signals (PRD §10)
GET /feed/recommended — cold start / default surahs when sparse history
POST /feed/interactions — persist FeedHistory; update Redis streak keys if needed
Redis: feed:user:{userId}:{mood} cache + invalidation on preference change
Graceful degradation when AI or upstream Quran API fails

tasks.title: Reflections module (/reflections/*)
tasks.description: Private journal per ayah per PRD §6.5.

subtasks.title: POST /reflections — create; validate ayahKey + content
GET /reflections — pagination; filter by ayahKey optional
DELETE /reflections/:id — owner-only
POST /collections + GET /collections
POST /collections/:id/ayahs + DELETE /collections/:id/ayahs/:ayahId (id = ayah key or document contract)
Optional: GET/PATCH/DELETE /collections/:id if product confirms

tasks.title: Streaks module (/streaks/*)
tasks.description: Daily streak logic per PRD §6.7; Redis streak:{userId} optional mirror.

subtasks.title: GET /streaks/me — current/longest/lastActiveDate
POST /streaks/update — idempotent daily tick; timezone rules
Sync streak cache in Redis when implemented

tasks.title: AI module — Gemini (/ai/*)
tasks.description: Micro-insights and emotion tags with caching and safety per PRD §6.8.

subtasks.title: Gemini client + GEMINI_API_KEY config
POST /ai/insight — prompt templates; cache insight:{ayahKey} (+ prompt version)
POST /ai/emotion-tag — structured output for mood matching
Rate limits + timeouts; never block feed indefinitely

tasks.title: Redis caching — PRD §8 coverage
tasks.description: Implement remaining key patterns beyond partial feed/ayah work.

subtasks.title: trending:topics (optional MVP stub)
Document TTL + invalidation rules in code comments or README
Structured logs + request/correlation IDs
Sentry or equivalent (optional)
Global exception filter + sanitized client errors

tasks.title: API contract & developer experience
tasks.description: OpenAPI/Swagger or static OpenAPI file generated from Nest.

subtasks.title: Add @nestjs/swagger + document all routes and DTOs
Versioning strategy (v1 path prefix) if product requires later
Push notifications
Realtime (WebSockets)
Social feed + admin analytics dashboard
